2026 scrapbook

go to month: january february march april may june july

key legend ~ = ongoing / ‚úò = dropped / ‚úî = finished / ‚ü≥ = repeat
‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ = i am probably pissed as FUCK / ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ = did not like / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ‚òÜ = eh? / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ = its okay / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ = enjoyable / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ = perfect
  • show / anime
  • movies
  • video games
  • music
  • books / manga

july

highlights

started a new job as a web developver at my uni / finishing my web comms too! / got sepiarecord.net set up on nearlyfreespeech with PHP and mySQL omg finallyyyy / got myself a switch 2!!!

media

  • deltarune (chapter 2) / ‚úî / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • deltarune (chapter 3) / ‚úî / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ
  • silksong / ~

    currently fighting for my life with last judge okay that was painful but i did it yay!

  • a time to kill / ‚ü≥ / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • evil dead burn / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ

    i fucked with this ngl but also felt like i was watching it from like a gta movie theater. i won't explain any further.

  • deltarune (chapter 4) / ~

gallery

been playing a lot of deltarune lately. also the cover is so cute i love it very much.

june

highlights

celebrated my b-day with friends, ice cream cake, and a hacked wii u! / been rollerskating frequently / got a new job offer / quit my fuckass retail job / decided to rework my site from the ground up!

media

  • taiko no tatsujin (wii u version) / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • all guitar hero games for the wii but mostly 5 and 3 / ~ / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

    i fuck with this so heavy

this cake was so good

may

highlights

fighting for my life finishing my 5th uni semester!

april

highlights

finished my first vgen web commission for cu77lefish.ink / went to comic con as angel devil! microblog post / went back to rollerskating and bought new rollerskates!

media

  • ikiru / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ
  • the red parts / ~

    reading this for an english exam so i can skip taking the class... i am not gonna lie this is a bit too much for me. like in a personal sense. it has made me really uncomfortable at times.

  • the drama / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • project hail mary / ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

my new rollerskates!
i loved this cosplay so muchh it was so fun
the vocaloid rave was so fucking fun
some protest signs at my uni

march

highlights

me trying to keep up with everything ever / working on commissions and such! / went bowling / started rollerskating again! / went to a vocaloid rave and i danced my ass off / lowkey failing a class

media

  • the bear and the wild cat by kazumi yumoto

    did a fun exercise for my spanish class where we had to read a couple of kid's books.

  • 10,000 dresses by marcus ewert
  • my hiroshima by junko morimoto
  • magia record | ~

    while i wait for the 3rd movie to come out, i might as well watch this.

  • i saw the tv glow | ‚ü≥ | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • hoppers | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • i love my computer by ninajirachi | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

    i really love this so much... been getting back into this kinda edm sound i used to lsiten to when i was in high school i feel so nostalgic for it.

  • why i write by Joan Didion

    been having to read essays for an english exam i have to take so i can be able to skip the class and i really like this one. i related to it a lot with my process of writing.

  • viva la vida or death and all his friends by coldplay | ‚ü≥ | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ and a half

    found a music shop nearby and was able to get the jewel case of this album. i forgot how good it is white people are soooo right for loving viva la vida so much. i love it a lot too.

  • PMMM rebellion | ‚ü≥ | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ
  • seven samurai | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

gallery

i loved the illustrations in The bear and The Wildcat
i am SO excited for my angel cosplay!
i ran out of gas and had to cook my rice in the air fryer. it was aninteresting experience. the rice came out really good.

february

highlights

1st web commission of the year! / having such a humble experience in my computer architecture class.

media

  • brokeback mountain | ‚ü≥ | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ
  • fallout (season 2) | ‚úî | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ

    i love new vegas and all that but this season felt a bit messy compared to the banger that was the first one...

  • iron lung | ‚úò

    marking this as dropped because i fell asleep midway through the movie bc nothing was happening and i was really fucking tired LOL. will watch at some point though, i found it pretty interesting at least.

gallery

madohomu pins from a friend
valentine's day card my gf gave me!
free sticker i got recently

january

highlights

cleaning and re-organizing my apartment / started my 5th semester at uni. i'm basically halfway through my degree. kinda / went on my first walk of the year.

media

  • fallout (season 2) | ~
  • yoshi's woolly world | ~
  • infinity nikki | ‚úî

    finished the main quest! lets gooooo!

  • kirby and the forgotten land | ~
  • pacific rim | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ

    YOUVE NEVER SEEN PACIFIC FIM?!?!?!? ~ people when i tell them i've never seen pacific rim

  • fiona and cake (season 2) | ‚úî | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ
  • shoftlifters | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

    watched another hirokazu koreeda movie and my god this was just so beautiful. why is every film i've watched from this director so fucking painful??? i really loved monster but this story comes pretty close and the way it all unravels at the end.... i can't wait to fucking DIE when the live action movie of look back releases.

  • project x | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ

    i feel like i should have NOT enjoyed this movie as much as i did. i only watched it because of clips i've seen from it while looking up heads will roll remixes by the yeah yeah yeahs. like this video. i did not expect it to be this funny though AND i did not expect MY MANNNNNN thomas mann to be one of the protagonists either. i miss seeing him in stuff... making me want to rewatch me and earl and the dying girl but i need to be strong.

  • 28 years later: the bone temple | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ

    i had such a fucking blast with this movie.

  • sweetpea | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ

    been meaning to watch this bc i love ella purnell and i love it when women go insane. i should read the book. i should read MORE books.

  • when the wind blows | ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÖ‚òÜ‚òÜ

    really nice animation. also kinda sad.

the cover of my 2026 planner
build a lego bouquet set, it was a bootleg one though but it still looks pretty!
wanna get into making bracelets and stuff. i made this charm for my flip!
went to a ramen place and it was so good"
